ItacPersonItem.Notes: `Primo gentiluomo di camera, poi maggiordomo` of Maurizio di Savoia. At the Cardinal`s departure from Rome, Ludovico became ambassador for Duke Carlo Emanuele I at the Holy See.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
